text.title: Record-Replay Debugging Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to emit a validated record-replay-debugging spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Parse input YAML; validate every required driver populated.
Step 2 — Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml using the drivers; pick the matching leaf rule.
Step 3 — Fill decision.* fields per the matched rule; populate audit.rule_refs with the leaf id.
Step 4 — Run scripts/validate-record-replay-debugging.py; on exit 0 commit the spec.
